title: Print paths in Staircase
hints: Use backtracking to generate all possible paths.
At each step, you can either climb 1 step or 2 steps.
Keep track of the current number of steps climbed and the path taken.
When steps == A, add the current path to the result.
After each recursive call, backtrack by removing the last step from the path.
Try 1 step first, then 2 steps to maintain lexicographical order.
